UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, including contact details and public display data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

phone.description: The user's phone number, expected in Indian format (e.g., +91XXXXXXXXXX).

profileImage.description: URL to the user's profile picture stored in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created, in ISO 8601 format (IST timezone).

ProductListing.title: ProductListing
ProductListing.description: Represents a single product listing posted by a user for sale.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductListing entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who posted this listing. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ProductListing)

title.description: The title of the product listing.

description.description: A detailed description of the product being sold.

price.description: The price of the product in Indian Rupees (INR).

category.description: The category of the product (e.g., keyboard, mouse, GPU, laptop).

city.description: The city where the product is located for sale.

state.description: The state where the product is located for sale (optional).

images.description: An array of URLs to images of the product stored in Firebase Storage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the listing was created, in ISO 8601 format (IST timezone).

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. The `userId` parameter matches the authenticated user's UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: listingId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific product listing.
